value.0: This arrow not only pierces its target, it also releases a splash of alchemical acid on impact.
Ice Arrows give off a blast of frigid cold when they strike their target, flash-freezing armor and flesh alike.
Lightning Arrows explode in sparks on impact, inflicting electrical damage to their target.
Fire Arrows burst into flames when fired, with an effect almost identical to a nonmagical arrow doused in oil and set alight.
This amulet grants its wearer increased endurance.

Although it appears to be a simple pearl on a light chain, a Periapt of Wisdom is a powerful item. These items improve perception and insight, and are often used as meditative tools by high-ranking clergy of a faith.
